model_id: claude-opus-4-7 (orchestrator); dispatched subagents inherit from harness
notes: Single-model pin: Claude family. Per-rubric, per-scenario rater independence (one rater agent per (scenario, rubric) batch covers all 5 runs of that scenario for that rubric). Per-(scenario, run) simulator independence (one simulator agent per (scenario, run_number) pair).
scoring_granularity: batched: one rater per (scenario x rubric), all 5 runs scored in a single context (36 calls; deviates from AGENTS.md isolated protocol). Scored in same session as v0.2-revised.
